channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-24
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects. Notably, the `statcheck` and `oddpub` projects have made administrative updates and code validation improvements, respectively. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has addressed several documentation and test issues, including adding diagnostics and fixing rendering problems. The `coarse` project has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `regcheck` has made significant updates, including bug fixes and improvements to its demo page and survey routes. Additionally, `escicheck` has synchronized with `escicheckapp` to reflect the latest version of `effectcheck`, highlighting the connections and collaborations within our community. These updates demonstrate the community's commitment to improving and refining its tools, and we celebrate the progress made across these projects.

17 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

tenzing9 commits
metacheck6 commits
oddpub1 commits
escicheck1 commits
